response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, and cloud technologies, aligning with the job requirements. Their background in full-stack development and contributions to various technical projects demonstrate their technical capabilities.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows
Strong background in full-stack development and cloud technologies
concerns: No direct mention of experience with vector databases or RAG architectures

No clear indication of expertise in LLM performance metrics and optimization techniques
